title: Nursery Rhyme. XXXIX. Literal
content:
Miss one, two, and three could never agree,
        While they gossiped round a tea-caddy.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. XXXIX. Literal", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
